title: Default Column from Board to use in My Work
excerpt:
I’d like the ability to define which date/Timeline column and which Status column on a board will be used by My Work by default. 
By being able to do this, we can eliminate the extra step of customizing of settings in My…

posts.author: philip.beaudoin (Phil Beaudoin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like the ability to define which date/Timeline column and which Status column on a board will be used by My Work by default.

By being able to do this, we can eliminate the extra step of customizing of settings in My Work when boards are created with a template.

posts.author: mgivot (Matt Dean Givot)
posts.cookedHtml: agree 100% I was Looking to see if I can learn what the defaults are so I can reverse engineer my boards to eliminate that step - but your idea is so much better
